title: 阪神JFの後に・精一杯のウイリー！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka pushes herself to overcome the high
hurdle of a G1 race by racing in the Hanshin J.F.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Vodka and I talk about what's to
come. If she's aiming for the Japanese Derby, the
Classic Triple Crown tour is the way to go, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Provoked by Daiwa Scarlet, Vodka decides to
break convention and take on the Tulip Sho next.
